narrative:
York (precinct in Union County) has 938 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.9 percentage points.
